name: fleetops
description: Run API + Next.js together for local development

scripts.setup: node scripts/pip-install-backend.mjs && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8000/health -t 120000 && cd frontend && npm run dev
